description: Configure a product review system for the Urban Electronics store. Create a new Comment Type labeled 'Product Review' (machine name: 'product_review'). Add a comment field to the 'Default' Product type labeled 'Reviews' (machine name: 'field_reviews') using the 'Product Review' comment type. Verify the configuration by posting a review on the 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' product page with the subject 'Amazing Quality' and body 'Best headphones I've ever owned.'.
